markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Alex Reynolds for the Account Director role at growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Proven Growth Driver:** Drove 2.5x ROI for Webflow by navigating complex stakeholder politics and shifting strategy to Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), yielding \>40% of non-brand signups from ChatGPT.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [**Strategic Framework:** Balances rapid impact (quick wins in 30–90 days) with long-term strategy, using persona-centric content to future-proof against market shifts like AI search.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
  - [**AEO Pioneer:** Adapting SEO for AI by optimizing for prompts, earning citations, and enabling white-hat Reddit engagement, treating AI search as a new earned media channel.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [**Client Partner:** Builds deep partnerships by aligning with senior stakeholders to connect SEO work directly to core business goals, securing renewals even when growth targets are missed.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=2808.0)

## Topics

### The Director Role at growthx.ai

  - [**Primary Need:** A Director to strengthen client strategy and build repeatable processes for growth.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=2419.0)
  - [**Core Responsibilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
      - [Coach Managing Editors to connect content strategy to client revenue goals.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1984.0)
      - [Build stronger, more consistent client relationships to preempt issues.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=2539.0)
      - [Create repeatable processes to reduce reliance on "heroics."](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=2634.0)
  - [**Company Context:** A fast-growing (1-year-old, \~90 employees) agency with high demand, seeking to scale its strategic capacity.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=2707.0)

### Strategic Approach: Balancing Short & Long-Term Growth

  - [**Short-Term Impact (30–90 Days):**](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
      - [**Technical Quick Wins:**](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
          - [Migrate blogs from subdomains to the main domain.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
          - [Implement internal linking to hit a "watershed" threshold (e.g., 7–10 links) that unlocks significant traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
      - [**On-Page Quick Wins:**](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
          - [Optimize title tags and headers on high-value pages.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [**Long-Term Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
      - [**Persona-Centric Content:** Align all content with a specific, high-value user persona (e.g., Webflow's focus on agencies, not small businesses) to drive ROI and future-proof the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=2312.0)
      - [**Answer Engine Optimization (AEO):** Adapt SEO for AI search.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
          - [**Technical:** AEO requires the same strong technical foundation as SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
          - [**On-Page:** Optimize for prompts and questions (e.g., question-based headers, FAQs).](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
          - [**Earned Media:**](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
              - [**Citations:** Earn mentions in sources ChatGPT cites.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
              - [**Reddit:** Enable internal teams for white-hat engagement on brand-specific threads.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
          - [**Owned Media:** Expand branded content to answer direct product/feature questions.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)

### Case Study: Webflow (3-Year Engagement)

  - [**Challenge:** A large, complex client with internal silos and an initial POC resistant to cross-collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [**Year 1: Overcoming Blockers**](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [**Problem:** Graphite was siloed to editorial work, unable to access engineering resources for technical SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [**Solution:** Graphite leadership intervened, securing an engineering POC who granted the team a dedicated Webflow platform to build and launch technical projects independently.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [**Year 2: Editorial-Driven ROI**](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [Editorial work became a content engine, driving 2.5x ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [Technical projects were built from scratch, contributing to long-term value.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [**Year 3: AEO & Strategic Expansion**](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
      - [A new Director of Marketing provided an opportunity to build relationships across teams (marketing, product).](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
      - [Strategy expanded to high-impact areas: the template marketplace and showcase.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
      - [**AEO Shift:** Optimized content for AI overviews and ChatGPT prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
          - [**Result:** \>40% of non-brand signups now come from AI search (97% from ChatGPT).](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
          - [**Attribution:** Measured via referral codes; actual impact is likely higher.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)

### Client Management & Relationship Building

  - [**Core Challenge:** Identifying the correct stakeholders in large organizations to avoid invisible blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [**Solution:** Proactive relationship building with senior stakeholders beyond the primary POC.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=2808.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Secures buy-in for strategy and aligns work with high-level business goals.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=2808.0)
      - [**Result:** Builds trust and partnership, securing renewals even when specific growth targets are missed.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=2808.0)
  - [**Misalignment Resolution:**](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
      - [**Approach:** Frame deliverables as a starting point for collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Fosters a team mindset and ensures the final output is actionable and valuable.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**growthx.ai:** Review interview notes and determine next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=3010.0)
  - [**growthx.ai:** Contact Alex Reynolds with an update on the hiring process.](https://fathom.video/share/s6vx_ze1tsE3-jh9nyPZziHvNc8axxP5?tab=summary&timestamp=3010.0)
